title: Intense Spicy Portuguese Fish Bolinho
description: A quick-fix Portuguese dish featuring harissa spice, miso-marinate, and anti-inflammatory-friendly ingredients. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together miso paste, harissa spice, lemon juice, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Place the cod fillets in the marinade and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Remove the cod fillets from the marinade and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat a little olive oil in a separate skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped cilantro, minced garlic, cherry tomatoes, and red onion to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Season the vegetables with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the cooked cod fillets on top of the vegetables and garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
